entry.title: Re: SAP BTP - study groups
entry.content: Hello! I want to be part of the group too.

entry.title: Sales condition scales by unit price not condition value
entry.content:
Dear all , 

In sales pricing procedure , is it possible to apply % on base price condition by scales based on unit price not total condition value ?

Example :

0€ to 100€ --> 10% 

101€ to 200€ --> 20%

Amount = 10€ , Qty = 15 , Condition value = 150€

i need to apply condition 10% as 10€ belongs to (0 to 100) , as per current behavior system fetches 20% since 150€ belongs to (101 to 200)

entry.title: Re: Packaging material in sales order without WM in S4 HANA
entry.content:
You don't need to include the packaging material already on the sales order. It can be determined automaticaly on the delivery. On the delivery type you can activate settings "Automatic packing" and "Gen. pack.matl item". Item category determination will be done using PACK item usage.

In case you use item category group VERP the packaging material will be billing relevant (DLN item cat), in case you use LEIH it will be returnable packaging (TAL item cat).

See also:

Configuring Automatic packing in Outbound Delivery - SAP Community

entry.title: Re: New ABAP syntax, VALUE FOR skip appending entry if it already exists
entry.content:
Hi,
you should use the group function:

CLASS zcl_test_abap IMPLEMENTATION.
  METHOD if_oo_adt_classrun~main.
    TYPES: BEGIN OF ty_data,
             grp  TYPE c LENGTH 4,
           END OF ty_data,
           tty_data TYPE STANDARD TABLE OF ty_data WITH EMPTY KEY.

    FINAL(lt_data) = VALUE tty_data(
          ( grp = 'grp1' )
          ( grp = 'grp1' )
          ( grp = 'grp1' )
          ( grp = 'grp2' )
          ( grp = 'grp2' )
          ( grp = 'grp3' )
          ( grp = 'grp3' ) ).


     data(lt_result) = VALUE tty_data(
       FOR GROUPS <wa_group> OF <wa_data> IN lt_data
            GROUP BY  <wa_data>
            ( corresponding #( <wa_group> ) ) ).

    out->write( name = 'result' data = lt_result[] ).
  ENDMETHOD.
ENDCLASS.

entry.title: Re: Gts commodity code transfer to S4

entry.title: Not Able to update Sales Pricing Data Dynamically for Different Pricing Conditions
entry.content:
Hi All,

I am trying to update Condition Amount of Pricing Data at Sales Order Item level on the basis of other Condition Type Calculated values using BADI (PRCG_DOC_ITEM_CONDITION_AMOUNT). Even in debugging values are populated in changing parameter but not reflecting at Sales Order Pricing Data.

Please help me with feasible solution.

Thanks

entry.title: Re: How to Find all my z programs or customised tcode, programs and reports
entry.content: @BrendaNwasiima you can try the following: Open SMARTFORMS, search for the form, Menu bar -> Environment -> Name of the Function Module, to go SE80 and search for it and then use the Where-Used option

entry.title: usercurriculumstatuses API in Successfactors learning.
entry.content:
We are using usercurriculumstatuses API in Successfactors learning.

Source system is sending combination of User ID and Curricula around 20-50 in one go to middleware which is calling our Learning API learning/odatav4/public/admin/curriculum-service/v1/UserCurriculumStatuses for fetching status  of completion, for each combination of user ID and curricula. As multiple calls are made around same time API is failing as it has threshold of 0.5sec for one request. Can we pass multiple combination of user ID and curricula in a single call to retrieve the status.

entry.title: Re: List of customers
entry.content: Great, thank you so much.

entry.title: Missing Infotype IT0709 and IT9901 for Some Employees During SF to SAP HCM Replication
entry.content:
Hi SAP Expert ,

We are experiencing an issue where IT0709 (External Data) and IT9901 (Organizational Assignment) are not created in SAP HCM when certain employee records are replicated from SuccessFactors Employee Central via CPI. This issue does not affect all employees but only a few cases. As a result, these employees have incomplete records, leading to downstream issues in payroll, reporting, and organizational assignments.

What is the best practice for error handling in CPI to prevent incomplete data transfer? Should we implement an Exception Subprocess to retry failed records?

We are using the predefined iFlow:
"Replicate Employee Master Data and Organizational Assignments from SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central to SAP ERP or SAP S/4HANA."

Are there any SAP Notes or best practices specifically for handling missing infotypes due to failed SuccessFactors-to-SAP HCM replication?

Thank you

BR

entry.title: SOAP WS-RM in CAP nod js project
entry.content:
I followed this SAP tutorial to consume a SOAP service from the Public Cloud (Consume SOAP Web Services in SAP Cloud Application Programming Model (CAP) | SAP Tutorials). The use case as defined in the tutorial is working 100%. I have updated the soap service to Proof Of Delivery (Overview | Proof of Delivery ‒ Update (B2B) | SAP Business Accelerator Hub). However, this service requires WS-RM to operate correctly. 

How do I configure WS-RM in a CAP project with a node.js backend? In PostMan, you can add the following header: 

    <soap:Header>
        <wsa:messageId>urn:uuid:{{$randomUUID}}</wsa:messageId>
    </soap:Header>
which solves the issue, but this is not working when adding it to node.js

entry.title: Re: New ABAP syntax, VALUE FOR skip appending entry if it already exists
entry.content: Hello, I have tested the code but unfortunately the reality is a bit different than what I described and it doesn't work. In the real case this piece of code is being called inside of a loop where I am being given several entries for each key. On the first iteration we go through all the entries and everything is okay. But the program is a dynpro so when the user interacts with it somehow we restart the loop and we go over the same entries again. So my goal is to prevent that and just keep the entries from the first run, if we go over the entries again with the same key then we just need to update the values with the new ones. Is it still possible with the new syntax?

entry.title: Re: service level % in sap

entry.title: Re: Company Structure Configuration
entry.content: Hi @Elsa123, thanks for quick reply! 🙂

entry.title: Re: Error when trying to get ALV data from standard program
entry.content:
The error indicates some Inconsistent Structure Table?

Did you already

  • Define your extracted internal table as TYPE TRLY_FLOW_ALV (or TABLE OF TRLS_FLOW_ALV)
  • Use R_DATA_DESCR for some dynamic coding with RTTI
  • Debug to look at actual received data type
  • Try to use GET_DATA and not GET_DATA_REF

Could you provide definition of fields such as LS_DATA (TYPE REF TO DATA?)

entry.title: Indicator value shows as X and # in C4C report instead of YES or NO.
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

Is there any way to display YES or NO in report for custom indicator field instead of X and #?

In my case i have created a custom indicator field in opportunity overview page. I have fetch that field in report with Odata service. After extracting report, i see that indicator field value shows as X and # instead of YES or NO. I have tried to set it but it won't work.  Can anyone guide me on this?

 

 

Thank you!!!

 

Regards,

Dhaval Solanki

+91 9898712915

entry.title: Re: How to Find all my z programs or customised tcode, programs and reports
entry.content: i dont have the smartform name..its is what we are looking for.

entry.title: Re: How to Find all my z programs or customised tcode, pr...
entry.content:
To find the SmartForms used in your reports, perform a where-used search on the SSF_FUNCTION_MODULE_NAME function module call, filtering by package.

  • The form name is passed to the FORMNAME parameter, which can be defined as a constant elsewhere in the code, but can also be calculated or read for some Customizing table.

entry.title: Re: Storing Output Documents in SAP S/4HANA
entry.content:
Hi @Markus_Berg,

is there a plan in future S/4HANA releases to create the archiving link automatically when using the S/4HANA Output Control, so the archived document can be retrieved via the attachment list?

Thnx,

Dirk

entry.title: Re: Deploying SAP Business Network Supplier Portal with SAP S/4 HANA Cloud
entry.content: Does SAP Business Network Supplier Portal include Sourcing functionalities that enable vendors to respond to Requests for Quotation (RFQs) with bids or quotations?

entry.title: SAP Sales Cloud V2: What Sets It Apart from Competitors?
entry.content:
In the ever-evolving world of CRM and sales automation, businesses need a solution that doesn’t just manage customer data but drives intelligent engagement and business growth. SAP Sales Cloud V2 is designed to do exactly that. But what truly differentiates it from competitors like Salesforce, Microsoft Dynamics, and HubSpot? Let’s break it down in a way that makes it crystal clear for everyone working on Sales Cloud V2.

1. AI-Driven Sales Intelligence: Smarter, Not Just Faster

Unlike traditional CRM systems that rely heavily on manual data entry and basic automation, SAP Sales Cloud V2 integrates advanced AI and machine learning to provide predictive analytics, opportunity scoring, and intelligent recommendations.

How it’s different:

  • AI-based forecasting accuracy minimizes guesswork and maximizes revenue.

  • Embedded intelligent insights help sales reps prioritize leads that are most likely to convert.

  • AI-powered next-best actions give personalized recommendations to sales teams.

2. Seamless Integration with SAP Ecosystem: End-to-End Business Connectivity

Many CRM solutions focus solely on sales, leaving out critical business functions. SAP Sales Cloud V2 seamlessly integrates with SAP ERP, SAP S/4HANA, and other SAP solutions, ensuring complete business process alignment.

Why this matters:

  • Sales teams get real-time pricing, inventory availability, and order history from SAP ERP.

  • Finance and sales alignment improves revenue forecasting and order management.

  • Omnichannel engagement with integration into SAP Service Cloud and SAP Commerce Cloud.

3. Modern User Experience: Fast, Intuitive, and Mobile-First

Salespeople don’t have time for complex interfaces. SAP Sales Cloud V2 brings a modern, intuitive UX with a mobile-first approach that enhances usability and adoption.

What makes it better?

  • New Fiori-based UI is clean, simple, and easy to navigate.

  • Mobile-first design ensures reps can work efficiently from any device.

  • Actionable dashboards present key data in an easily digestible way.

4. Flexibility & Extensibility: Tailored for Every Business

Competitors often have rigid CRM structures that require heavy customization. SAP Sales Cloud V2 is built with flexibility in mind, allowing businesses to adapt, extend, and scale as needed.

Key differentiators:

  • Low-code/no-code extensions allow easy customization without heavy development effort.

  • Industry-specific configurations offer tailored solutions out-of-the-box.

  • API-first approach ensures smooth integrations with third-party applications.

5. Subscription-Based Pricing with Transparent TCO

Unlike some competitors that bundle features into higher-priced tiers, SAP Sales Cloud V2 offers a transparent pricing model that aligns with business needs.

Why it stands out:

  • Predictable costs with subscription-based pricing.

  • No hidden fees for core functionalities like analytics and AI-powered insights.

  • Scalability to add more users and features as the business grows.

6. Data Privacy & Security: A Compliance Powerhouse

Data protection is non-negotiable. SAP Sales Cloud V2 provides enterprise-grade security and compliance, which is crucial for businesses handling sensitive customer data.

Competitive advantage:

  • Built-in compliance with GDPR, CCPA, and other data regulations.

  • End-to-end encryption ensures customer data remains protected.

  • Data residency options for businesses with strict localization requirements.

The Bottom Line: SAP Sales Cloud V2 is Future-Ready

While competitors focus on traditional CRM functionalities, SAP Sales Cloud V2 stands out by integrating AI, automation, and deep SAP ecosystem connectivity. It is built for businesses that want to go beyond managing sales and start optimizing every customer interaction.

For internal teams working on SAP Sales Cloud V2, understanding these differentiators is key to showcasing why our solution is the best choice. Every feature and integration we build makes a difference in how businesses sell, connect, and grow.

So, the next time someone asks, "What makes SAP Sales Cloud V2 special?"—you now have the answer! 🚀

entry.title: Re: VB6 application with Crystal report
entry.content:
Searching for "vb6 error detected by database dll" on google lists a few (very old) posts having the same issue.

My first guess would be (as it is also mentioned in the first result on google): Did you make sure all necessary dependencies are installed on the target pc?

entry.title: Log of changes in Material Master EWM
entry.content:
We are using EWM.
Using /scwm/Mat1 we can change master data.

However I like to see who and when applied changes to a certain article.

In MM it was easy. In the menu we could choose "changes" however in EWM I don't seem to find this.

entry.title: How can I extract the reference number from the <Ustrd> tag in an EBS file?
entry.content:
Dear SAP Community,

I have a question regarding the <Ustrd> tag. When reading an EBS file, the reference number is typically found within this tag. However, there is also additional text next to the reference number that is not needed for my use case. How can I extract only the reference number from this tag?

Is there a method to parse the content of the <Ustrd> tag and retrieve just the reference number, excluding the other text? Any advice on how to achieve this would be greatly appreciated.

entry.title: Advice Needed: SAP ABAP vs. SAP FI for a Quick Career Entry
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I’m about to finish my Master’s degree in Computer Science and preparing for my entry into the job market. I have 6 months of experience in SAP ABAP and have also completed an intensive 3-month SAP FI course.

Now, I’m wondering which path would be better for a quick entry into the job market—should I focus on ABAP, or continue with SAP FI? Has anyone had a similar background or can share recommendations?

I appreciate any advice and insights!

Best regards,
Imad

entry.title: Handling Overflow of Characters in <Ustrd> Tag During EBS File Processing
entry.content:
Dear SAP Community,

I have a question regarding the processing of EBS files using program FF_5. In the case of the <Ustrd> tag, which typically holds reference information, the tag is limited to 140 characters. However, if the content exceeds this limit and contains more than 140 characters, I would like to know how SAP handles this scenario.

  • Does SAP FF_5 read only the first 140 characters and ignore the rest, or is there any way for SAP to process the additional characters?
  • If SAP does ignore the additional characters, what happens to them? Are they lost, or is there any functionality in place to capture the overflow (for example, moving the extra text to another field or row)?

Any insights or recommendations for handling this situation would be greatly appreciated.

Thank you so much for the blog, it is very helpful.

But I am facing issue while generating additional column after using the invoke function.

It is always showing error in each row of the new column:

Could you please help us how to resolve the issue, as we cannot see any data of any entity in PBI.

entry.title: 🇦🇹 Build AI services using the SAP Cloud Application Programming Model and SAP generative AI Hub
entry.content:
This SAP CodeJam event is on the topic of Build AI services using the SAP Cloud Application Programming Model, SAP AI Core and SAP generative AI Hub. It is beneficial if you have some basic knowledge about JavaScript as we're using the SAP Cloud SDK for AI with the JavaScript variant.

This CodeJam introduces attendees to aspects of exposing generative artificial intelligence (genAI) capabilities to execute tasks using a given business context.

During this event, you'll become acquainted with the theory behind genAI, SAP AI Core, SAP AI Launchpad, and learn how to use the SAP Cloud Application Programming Model to expose AI capabilities through your own OData service.

While working through the exercises, you'll become comfortable creating CDS-based service definitions and integrating them into the SAP Business Technology Platform (BTP) and SAP AI Core Foundation Models.

This is an in-person event only (not virtual) and is planned for Thursday March 20th, 2025 in Vienna, Austria 🇦🇹 from 10:00 am - 4:00 pm. The exact location is TBA. The event will be held in english.

The instructor will be the Developer Advocate @KRiedelsheimer 

Prerequisites: Any Chromium-based web browser, such as Google Chrome.

Please note that seating is limited - we can only accomodate 30 attendees. Register here in the Community Event using the RSVP functionality.

For more information on SAP CodeJam events, to ask questions, and to chat with your fellow attendees, head over to the SAP CodeJam group.

entry.title: Re: Create a Blog button is Disabled. How to enable it ?
entry.content: Hi Jerry, I have completed all the steps in community - 2024 but still not able to create a blog. Did I miss anything here?

entry.title: Re: Error when trying to get ALV data from standard program
entry.content: When it happens, you can debug and find the location where it's raised. Add a break-point there, run again, and see the values of the components. Reason/my 2 cents: one of the components has a "non-strict" name (i.e. a special character in the name like a dash), and it's not supported.

entry.content:
Hello Expert,
Can we use voice commands to execute work orders or navigation in SAM
Is there any way we can include the voice commands for example to Start Work, Hold etc.

Any input will be helpful.
Regards,
Onkar

entry.title: Re: ABAP CDS annotation for OData boolean ?
entry.content:
Brilliant! This works well! 

Empty selection filters for both "yess/no". 

Great solution.

entry.title: message type DESADV - outbound delivery - FM issue
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

In VL02N, we are generating outbound IDOCs via output type. We skip particular kinds of materials and send the IDOC. This scenario works fine in the PRD system but not in the QA system. The QA system sends all the materials.

The configured function module is IDOC_INPUT_FINSTA, but it triggered IDOC_OUTPUT_DELVRY. it triggers the user exit EXIT_SAPLV56K_001 and EXIT_SAPLV56K_002 but there is no validation. 

There is no option to regenerate the IDOC in the PRD system. Where should I check for the issue in the QA system?

Thanks with regards,

vallamuthu M

entry.title: Re: what documents, data or attachments are stored on DMS...
entry.content:
Hi, 

with regard to table "DMS_CONT1_CD1" I can provide the following information form DMS application side.

This table stores data for the originals checked in to this SAP-DB table. Normally this means a content repository like DMS_C1 is used. You can check this in transaction OAC0. Here you look for content repository with storage type "SAP System Database" and then in you see which table is used to store the data. In the standard of repository DMS_C1 this is table DMS_CONT1_CD1. 

But of course it might be that other content repositories have been configured with the same table too. From DMS application side you can check the document area value. In the DMS application only storage categories with value 'DMS' in field "Document Area" are considered.

Cheers 
Christoph

entry.title: Ignore previous completion flag Completion
entry.content: Ignore previous flag completion is exclusively used by us, but as it is not getting updated in bulk by connector and Import jobs, its a manual activity every time, is there any workaround?

entry.title: Re: Error when trying to get ALV data from standard program
entry.content:
• Are there any enhancements to the TRLS_FLOW_ALV structure or report logic in your system?
  • Call the report directly and view the ALV Consistency Check for 'exotic' fields in internal table and/or field catalog.

entry.title: Re: Billing plan and Billing date needs to be updated in...
entry.content:
Execute the below code in include RV60FUS4 for user exit call.

FORM USEREXIT_FIELD_MODIFICATION.
* For Date Determination Rule: 'ZD'-Quarterly (on First of Next Month)
* Update the billing date to 1st day of second month of the Quarter
* for selected line item in a Contract.

* Data Declaration
DATA: lv_mon TYPE i,
lv_day TYPE i.

READ TABLE xfpla TRANSPORTING NO FIELDS WITH KEY perio = 'ZD'.
IF sy-subrc IS INITIAL.
IF xfpla-bedar IS NOT INITIAL AND xfpla-endar IS NOT INITIAL.
CLEAR: xfpla-bedar, xfpla-endar.
ENDIF.
LOOP AT xfplt ASSIGNING FIELD-SYMBOL(<fs_fplt>).
IF <fs_fplt> IS ASSIGNED.
lv_mon = <fs_fplt>-nfdat+4(2).
lv_day = <fs_fplt>-afdat+6(2).
lv_mon = lv_mon - 1.
IF lv_mon = 00 OR lv_mon IS INITIAL.
lv_mon = 12.
ENDIF.
<fs_fplt>-afdat+4(2) = lv_mon.
IF lv_day GT 01.
lv_day = 01.
ENDIF.
<fs_fplt>-afdat+6(2) = lv_day.
ENDIF.
ENDLOOP.
ENDIF.

ENDFORM. " USEREXIT_FIELD_MODIFICATION

entry.title: Re: SAP Integration Suite - Inbuilt Retry option for HTTP Receiver Adapter
entry.content:
Hi all,
I'd like to share my experience with this feature.

When the 'Retry Failed Requests' option is checked and the URL address is stored inside a property I get a run time error:

However, when the URL address is stored inside headers the iFlow works correctly.

entry.title: How can I implement tenant-specific workflow definitions in my SaaS CAP application on SAP BTP?
entry.content:
I have a SaaS application for managing my own projects, and I need to collaborate with multiple clients. Each client has its own unique project management workflow, which may involve different steps, such as task assignments, progress tracking, and reporting. The workflows may also vary depending on the project type, scope, or timeline but all of them will always have the same input (e.g., a list of String).

I need to accommodate these varying workflows without requiring each client to subscribe to the SAP Build Process Automation. My clients should be able to customize their own workflows without incurring additional costs.

I use a multi-tenancy approach, where each client is a separate sub-account in the SAP BTP. My application needs to determine which workflow to use for each client and trigger the relevant workflow processes via API calls.

Requirements:

  1. Each client's workflow should be isolated from other clients' workflows.
  2. My application should be able to trigger the correct workflow for each client based on their unique requirements.
  3. My clients should not need to subscribe to the SAP Build Process Automation.
  4. My application should be able to handle varying workflow processes, including conditional logic and different output formats (e.g., PDF, Excel).

Current Approach:

One possible approach is to use a single sub-account for my application and add representatives from each client to that account. Each representative can be assigned to their own workflow, and my application can use JavaScript to call the Workflow API from BTP to retrieve and filter workflows based on a unique identifier (e.g., client ID or user email).

However, this approach requires two API calls, which may not be the most efficient solution. Is there a better way to achieve this multi-tenancy workflow management without incurring additional costs or complexity?

Thank you!

entry.title: Re: Requirement of 4 savings plan and employer contribution cap
entry.content:
Hi Rahul, 

Can you share an example to help me understand?

Best

Simar

entry.title: Attribute of item in a curricula changes post item is revised
entry.content: When an item is revised via connector, the old revision is inactive, new revision is updated in all curriculum where old revision of that item existed. But attributes of the old revision like initial days, retraining number, ignore previous flag etc are getting changed to the default values what are there at item level, as different curricula had different attributes of the item, on revision the old attributes should be preserved and not replaced with the default ones at item level. This is a major manual work for every client.

entry.title: Re: Journal entry impact (Finance impact) manually close...
entry.content: Any kind of financial impact? Any kind of report impact?

entry.title: Re: Issue with mbt build in Newly Created CAP Project on...
entry.content: @BhanuKiran1 Is the gen/db folder created when you execute the `cds build --production` command?

entry.title: Re: Document Info Record (DIR) Attachments issue
entry.content:
Hi, 
regarding issues when you have problems displaying files in a document info record I would recommend to take a look at the application log data in transaction SLG1. Here you can do a selection with the userID who has simulated the behavior before. 

At first sight it might look like everything is green but please expand the entries and also check the details. Another option is to use report DMS_KPRO_READ for the document info record and in its result you get listed all originals available and also a download button. 

Br

Christoph

entry.title: Re: Does SAC have a Rank function?
entry.content: Hi Yogeshwar, Thank you but that is not all. I want to be able to create similar Rank columns for a couple of measures in the able and then be able to add the values in the Rank columns horizontally (row) and then arrive at a Final column which contains the sum of rank values in each cell. I could not achieve this with the method you specified above. I am curious to know if a calculated rank column can be created manually like other calculations so that my requirement can be achieved?

entry.title: Sap.Data.SQLAnywhere.SAException (0x80004005): Procedure 'Describe' not found
entry.content:
Hi

If I run - Describe TableName - in Interactive SQL it returns the column name, type, nullable and Primary Key - but when running the same from a .NET app it throws the above error. The full text of the error is below. Any ideas?

Thanks

Sap.Data.SQLAnywhere.SAException (0x80004005): Procedure 'Describe' not found
at Sap.Data.SQLAnywhere.SACommand._ExecuteReader(CommandBehavior commandBehavior, Boolean isExecuteScalar, Boolean isBeginExecuteReader)
at Sap.Data.SQLAnywhere.SACommand.ExecuteReader()
at Sap.Data.SQLAnywhere.SADataAdapter.OpenDataReader(Boolean schemaOnly, Boolean& closeConnection, SACommand selectCommand)
at Sap.Data.SQLAnywhere.SADataAdapter.OpenDataReader(Boolean schemaOnly, Boolean& closeConnection)
at Sap.Data.SQLAnywhere.SADataAdapter.Fill(DataSet dataSet, Int32 startRecord, Int32 maxRecords, String srcTable, IDbCommand command, CommandBehavior behavior)
at System.Data.Common.DbDataAdapter.Fill(DataSet dataSet)

entry.title: Re: How are DMS filters enabled or configured?
entry.content:
Hi,
for information on this please see https://help.sap.com/docs/SUPPORT_CONTENT/sapdms/3363506465.html?q=filter.

Br

Christoph

entry.title: Re: foreign currency fioris don´t work
entry.content:
Usually no, could you be more specific?

  • For Standard Fiori look for OSS notes, etc.
  • For Customer Fiori check amount in currency field, the conversion function in the "Attributes" tab should be updated as "AL.=" to use the currency code and update the decimal place accordingly.

entry.title: Re: Application preview in VS Code vs Deploy to ABAP
entry.content:
@Rutul 

Have you checked the $metadata request in the network tab to see if the annotation for the value help is included?

entry.title: Re: Datasphere replication flow Initial load in progress...
entry.content:
Please implement all Notes, out come from t-code CNV_NA_DI and also all pre-req notes from 3254953 and 3499630.
This also depends on the S4 version.

Best Regards
Arvind

entry.title: Re: CCV2 2211 deployment faills with the e erro- Componen...
entry.content: This kind of issue indicates that at least one of the application pods has encountered exception that caused failure in startup and most probably is in constant restarting loop. Please make sure to check Services in Cloud Portal to identify such pods (or use Dynatrace monitoring) and check the logs for that pod(s). Usually the first error in the logs is the one that you need to check.

entry.title: Re: 🇮🇳 Getting Started with Machine Learning using SAP HANA (Bangalore, India)
entry.content: Please consider me in the waitlist.

entry.title: Re: 🇮🇳 Getting started with Generative AI Hub on SAP AI Core (Bangalore, India)
entry.content: Please consider me in the waitlist.

entry.title: Re: CCM - Statistical price condition in delta accruals
entry.content:
Dear Umasaral,

I completely agree with your assessment—the issue appears to stem from account determination and its relationship with accrual and statistical pricing conditions. We have rechecked the configuration for both price conditions and the pricing schema, and it aligns with what is outlined in the SAP documentation.

I believe achieving the desired outcome using standard functionality may not be possible. Document 0S42 is intended for delta accrual postings, even though the RED1 condition does not transfer the "accrual" flag in the pricing of the settlement document. Meanwhile, RED2 is classified as neither statistical nor accrual-related, and account determination is based on the account key for accruals.

Does anyone have suggestions for an alternative approach we could take to resolve this?

Best regards,

Michele

entry.title: The detail on alerts disapears after opening the documents on the detail
entry.content:
Hi, 
I found a problem with SAP B1 10 HANA and SQL versions.

I have an alert when new production orders are created. The alert is based on a query, and on the details is the the list of the new orders.

If I use the drill-down arrow and open and close multiple (+10) documents, from the list, and then I move to the next alert, all the details with the document list disappear. from all the alerts !

The query returns around 20/30 documents with just the number, date, project and status.

The alert

After the problem occurs

I have to close SAP B1 to get the alert details back.

Anyone with a similar issue ?
And better with a solution ?


Thanks,
Paulo

entry.title: Re: Attribute of item in a curricula changes post item is...
entry.content:
Hi,

One thing to check is whether the connector settings allow you to preserve these attributes. Some connectors have configuration options that let you control what gets updated during a revision. If that’s not available, another workaround could be custom business rules or workflows within SAP SuccessFactors LMS (if that’s what you’re using). Setting up automation to copy over attributes from the old item before it gets replaced could save time.

If your system allows API calls, you could also automate this by pulling the old attributes before a revision and applying them back to the new revision once it's updated.

entry.title: Re: MDI adapter in CPI
entry.content:

Please refer to the product documentation of the adapter - https://help.sap.com/docs/integration-suite/sap-integration-suite/sap-master-data-integration-receiver-adapter?version=CLOUD

Hope this helps.

Regards,
Karuna

Karuna

entry.content:
Hello 
How to assign tags to requirement using requirement template file please ?
It works partially :

- but not assigned to the requirement where they are supposed to --> KO

So I have a collection of created tags but not assigned to the requirement that I mentioned in the requirement template creation file 😕

I tried to update the already existing requirements but no more success.

Any help please ?

thanks

Helinna

entry.title: Weighting group total higher than 1
entry.content:
I have a scenario where i want to create a custom weighting group that goes past 1.00 for my total. It would be month 12 is .40, month 11 is .40, and month 10 is .40. It would be the same as the screenshot, but we need growth and have no old material to use referencing; material number has not changed in many years. 

Is this possible? We can't move off a weighted moving average W forecast model, so seasonal models and trend models are not an option at this time.

entry.title: Re: Gts commodity code transfer to S4
entry.content: Hello Hassett_Lee, So, if you see entries when field PROCESS is blank, these are the entries that the COMCO report is supposed to process. Have you done a debug?

Hi

same data are in TABAS table.

entry.title: Re: Deletion of sort sequence and manual storage bins Sorting for an activity in activity area
entry.content:

you are right with your steps we can select what we can delete particularly.

entry.title: UB document that does not record consumption
entry.content: We use UB purchase orders to move items from hubs to spokes. When those go materials go to other plants that are not designated replenishment paths, we want SAP to ignore the consumption all together in the corrected total, not just record it in unplanned consumption. We are overbuying due to operational issues and need to see if a customized version of UB purchase orders can ignore all consumption records for forecasting in the plant that sent the material. Is there a way to do this, and would the Consumption field KZVBR in EKPO be the field or setting that drives that?

entry.title: Re: Does anyone know where I can download compass example...
entry.content: Very good tip about Best Bike Model, found. Thanks!

entry.title: Re: Duplicate Check by Tax Number
entry.content: Above steps not workable ......

entry.title: Issue with Product Migration Object: Errors During Preparation Phase
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

I am currently working on migrating the Product object using a migration object, and I encounter the following errors during the Preparation phase. Up until this stage, everything works smoothly.

Errors Encountered:

  1. System error during the function module call in the sender system
    Message Class: DMC_RT_MSG
    Message Number: 203

  2. System error (Portion 0000000001, Conversion object Z_PRODUCT_M0U around 123713)
    Message Class: DMC_RT_MSG
    Message Number: 39

  3. _IT_IO_S_MBEW: Overwrite error: Column at serialization 10, actual column 11 (Conversion object Z_PRODUCT_M0U)
    Message Class: DMC_RT_MSG
    Message Number: 41

Context:
The migration object has been set up and executed successfully up to this phase. These errors occur during the Preparation stage of the migration process.

Could you please advise if there are any additional configurations or checks required to resolve these errors? Are there any specific areas (e.g., source system configurations, mapping rules, or settings in the migration cockpit) that I should revisit?

Any insights or suggestions would be highly appreciated!

Thank you in advance for your help!

entry.title: Re: Adding new properties for Business Partner Group
entry.content:
Hello,

 

You define the properties in Administration -> Setup -> Business Partners -> Business Partner Properties.

 

Best regards

entry.title: Re: Using Nio Protocol in Tomcat
entry.content:
I did check the documentation and it seems that this crucial information is missing for 2205 version: https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_COMMERCE/eed845124da0491e875df8139c4e6e8c/f18f6a711d07462b80137df6ed533eee.html?locale=en-US#patch-2205-24 . However if you check the same documentation for 2211 version (https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_COMMERCE_CLOUD_PUBLIC_CLOUD/75d4c3895cb346008545900bffe851ce/145c323e1d3e4fee8f69bafc4efe448a.html?locale=en-US) you will notice that you should use

protocol="HTTP/1.1"

entry.title: Unsupported evaluation Error
entry.content:
Helle everyone,

I created a visibility condition to hide a field, in the execution the field in hidden but the error appear in the mobile screen. could any one have explanation?
thank you

entry.title: Re: Order....: 1000820634 Residence time 1 not exceeded
entry.content:
Message no. BA235 - Following an error in CO78

Check in transaction SARA/CO78 -> Button Customizing -> Archiving Object-Specific Customizing -> Technical Settings

- Double-click the "Logical File Name Definition, Cross-Client" and find the logical file ARCHIVE_DATA_FILE in transaction FILE, then double click it, you can find the Logical Path is:

- Then find and click the Logical Path ARCHIVE_GLOBAL_PATH in the tree "Logical Path Definition" -> double click "Assignment of Physical Paths to Logical Path":

- Here you can find the setting of physical path in this case is:
Syntax group    WINDOWS NT Microsoft Windows NT
Physical path   <P=DIR_GLOBAL>/<FILENAME>

The F1 help (Performance Assistant) for "Physical path" is defined as below:

Examples

  • Local directory for temporary files under Windows NT:

D:\GLOBAL\ARCHIVE\<PARAM_1>\<FILENAME>

  • Local directory for temporary files under DOS:

C:\TMP\<FILENAME>

  • Local directory for temporary files under UNIX:

/usr/<SYSID>/local/tmp/<CLIENT>/<FILENAME>

The error message BA235 here is caused by the directory separator '/'.

entry.title: Re: List Report Controller Extension - custom button plus...
entry.content:
I think you two js files and use for your action like:

          "barcodeSearch": {
            "id": "barcodeSearch",
            "text": "Barcode Search",
            "press": "... .equipbcodelr.ext.controller.ListReportActionExt.scanMe",
            "requiresSelection": false
          },

So one file for your controller extension and one for the press action.

Also i recommend to do everything (creating custom action, creating controller extension) with the Fiori tools, so you dont have to worry about the details here.

entry.title: Re: [SAP Build Apps] how to disable dropdown field and change component style when disabled
entry.content:
For disabling the input field I do not know.

For changing colors based on disabled field, you can create a local palette color inside the input field and based on a formula for "self.disabled" and then use that to color parts of the input field. I could get it to work on sub components, and the whole mechanism is not so straightforward, but I was able to change the background or shadow of the input field.

entry.title: Re: Consuming a released event of an unreleased RAP BO (h...
entry.content:
Hi,

If you require additional standard events delivered by SAP or C1-released, you can raise your request via this campaign in the customer influence portal. 

Best regards, Bernd

entry.title: Re: Continous innovation compatability Integration pack
entry.content: You can use this help page to check which integration pack patch version is compatible with Commerce patch version: https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_COMMERCE_INTEGRATIONS/58d2065698d847efaa44e08c3556ae96/9a606e25695c4c9b95be4f14c2edeaae.html?locale=en-US&version=2211

entry.title: Re: Teams Management, Data Privileges and Data Locks in SAP PaPM Cloud - Universal Model
entry.content:
Hi,
Thanks for this great and detailed description! 
I have one question: does that mean that for each team I would like to create in your example Writer Team A, - B, Reader Team A, -B. There needs to be a separate role collection?

Background: We have the case that e.g., Writer Team A & Writer Team B have overall the same roles (in BTP subaccount), but just for specific data (managed with the CPE-UM-teams). I was hoping to keep the BTP role collections "clean" and then do the specific assignments only in CPE-UM.

Thanks for your support!
Best regards,
Rike

entry.title: Re: Communication Systems - It's not avaible in Fiori Lau...
entry.content:
Hi Brenomatias,

according to the screenshot it seems that your user is missing the administrator role which includes the "Communication System" app. 

Could you try by either logon with the administrator role or assign a role based on the template "SAP_BR_ADMINISTRATOR" to your user.

entry.title: Re: Add Button in Sales Order
entry.content:
Hello,

Your code is not adding the button in the form. You need to write the code to catch the event of the application corresponding to the sales order form loading and then create the button on it.

There is plenty of samples in the SDK documentation on how to do this.

Best regards

entry.title: Re: Order....: 1000820634 Residence time 1 not exceeded
entry.content: Are you facing an error here, or are you sharing additional information with the community?

entry.title: Re: [SAP Build Apps] how to disable dropdown field and change component style when disabled
entry.content:
Hi Dan,

Thanks for the help. I was able to change the font color inside the input field when disabling/enabling the field using a formula. This made me realize we can also do formulas in styles and layouts! (sadly, it is not an option for background color)

As for my first question, looks like a workaround that I can do is to just create two components inside the container, a dropdown field and a disabled input field, then switch the visibility to show the dropdown field when enabled, and the input field when disabled

entry.title: Re: Sap.Data.SQLAnywhere.SAException (0x80004005): Procedure 'Describe' not found
entry.content: As an update - SELECT c.column_name AS 'Name', c.base_type_str AS 'Type', c.nulls AS 'Nulls', c.`default` AS 'Default' FROM systabcol c KEY JOIN systab t ON t.table_name = 'MyTable' does the same thing. Any idea, though, how to determine if as default value is user or computed? Thanks

entry.title: Code Jam in Rotkreuz, Switzerland
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community, 

We are interested and would be looking forward to hosting an SAP CodeJam in our offices in Rotkreuz, ZG. Located in walking distance of public transportation and very accessible.

  • Location: Gambit-Consulting office in Rotkreuz, Switzerland
  • Topics in our scope:
    • With SAP Build, Create Apps, Processes, and Business Sites Without Coding
      or
    • ABAP Cloud & ABAP RESTful Application Programming Model
      or
    • Getting started with Generative AI Hub on SAP AI Core
  • Possible dates:
    • Rather flexible, preferably before July

An event with free coffee, croissants, and a business lunch to foster connections, get your feet wet in a new SAP topic and inspire productivity.

Looking forward to your response
Harry

entry.title: Re: Grow with Premium SAP Managed Cloud Integration
entry.content:
Hi Ravi, 

Currently SAP will setup the integration in production environment of S4 and SCV2. 
At present UAT or Test tenant for testing the integrations is not available. 

Thanks,
ShashanK Singor

entry.title: Re: How to use Soft-State support for OData services
entry.content:
Hi @Andre_Fischer ,

Is there an option for soft-state activation for RAP generated OData services (V2 and/or V4)?

I need this functionality, but I rather wanted to implement a OData service based o a RAP BO than a classic SEGW service.

Thanks in advance for your answer!

Octavian

entry.title: Re: Add Button in Sales Order
entry.content: Hi, Can you please provide a sample code.
